summary: Concedes a fact, then states something contrary. The first clause is TRUE, but the second clause contradicts expectations.
structure: 尽管 + fact, 但是/可是/还是 + contrary result
compare_note: 尽管 = factual (it IS raining). 即使 = hypothetical (even IF it rains).

examples.cn: 尽管天气很冷，他还是坚持每天跑步。
examples.py: Jǐnguǎn tiānqì hěn lěng, tā háishi jiānchí měitiān pǎobù.
examples.en: Despite the cold weather, he still runs every day.
examples.note: 还是 emphasizes persistence against the odds

examples.cn: 尽管工作很忙，但是她总是按时吃饭。
examples.py: Jǐnguǎn gōngzuò hěn máng, dànshì tā zǒngshì ànshí chīfàn.
examples.en: Despite being busy at work, she always eats on time.
examples.note: 但是 is the standard pair with 尽管

examples.cn: 尽管他解释了很多遍，大家还是不理解。
examples.py: Jǐnguǎn tā jiěshì le hěn duō biàn, dàjiā háishi bù lǐjiě.
examples.en: Despite his many explanations, no one understood.
examples.note: 还是不 = still don't (negative persistence)

examples.cn: 尽管这次考试比较难，但是大部分同学都通过了。
examples.py: Jǐnguǎn zhè cì kǎoshì bǐjiào nán, dànshì dà bùfen tóngxué dōu tōngguò le.
examples.en: Despite this exam being relatively hard, most students still passed.
examples.note: Common HSK 4 exam-context sentence; 大部分…都 widens the contrast

examples.cn: 尽管他来中国才两年，但是汉语已经说得很流利了。
examples.py: Jǐnguǎn tā lái Zhōngguó cái liǎng nián, dànshì Hànyǔ yǐjīng shuō de hěn liúlì le.
examples.en: Despite only being in China for two years, his Chinese is already very fluent.
examples.note: 才 + 已经 highlights surprising progress — classic HSK 4 reading topic

wrong_examples.wrong: 尽管明天可能下雨，我也要去。
wrong_examples.right: 即使明天可能下雨，我也要去。
wrong_examples.explain: Tomorrow's rain is hypothetical (hasn't happened) → use 即使, not 尽管.

wrong_examples.wrong: 尽管很累，所以我早点睡了。
wrong_examples.right: 尽管很累，但是我还是坚持工作。/ 因为很累，所以我早点睡了。
wrong_examples.explain: 尽管 pairs with 但是/还是 (contrast), NOT 所以 (result). If using 所以, the cause word should be 因为.

quiz.stem: ___价格比较贵，___这家餐厅的菜确实好吃。
quiz.explain: Concession (expensive BUT good) → 尽管…但是.

quiz.stem: ___他已经道歉了，她___不肯原谅他。
quiz.explain: He DID apologize (factual) → 尽管. If hypothetical, use 即使.

quiz.stem: ___学中文不容易，___越来越多的人开始学了。
quiz.explain: Concessive contrast → 尽管/虽然…但是. Never 所以.

exercises.sentence: 尽管很累，___他还是坚持完成了。
尽管下着大雨，他___出门了。

summary: States that the result holds true regardless of ANY condition. Often used with question words (什么/怎么/多么) to cover all possibilities.
structure: 不管 + question word + condition, 都/也 + result
compare_note: 不管 is spoken/casual. 无论 is formal/written. Both pair with 都/也.

examples.cn: 不管你怎么说，我都不会改变主意。
examples.py: Bùguǎn nǐ zěnme shuō, wǒ dōu bú huì gǎibiàn zhǔyì.
examples.en: No matter what you say, I won't change my mind.
examples.note: 怎么 covers all ways of saying

examples.cn: 不管天气好不好，我们都要出发。
examples.py: Bùguǎn tiānqì hǎo bù hǎo, wǒmen dōu yào chūfā.
examples.en: Regardless of the weather, we're leaving.
examples.note: A不A pattern covers both possibilities

examples.cn: 不管多忙，她都会给父母打电话。
examples.py: Bùguǎn duō máng, tā dōu huì gěi fùmǔ dǎ diànhuà.
examples.en: No matter how busy, she always calls her parents.
examples.note: 多+adj covers all degrees

examples.cn: 不管谁问起这件事，我都不会告诉别人。
examples.py: Bùguǎn shéi wèn qǐ zhè jiàn shì, wǒ dōu bú huì gàosu biérén.
examples.en: No matter who asks about this, I won't tell anyone.
examples.note: 谁 covers all possible askers; 都不 covers all possible recipients — common HSK 4 conversation frame

examples.cn: 不管什么时候出发，路上总会堵车。
examples.py: Bùguǎn shénme shíhou chūfā, lù shang zǒng huì dǔchē.
examples.en: No matter when you set out, you'll always run into traffic.
examples.note: 什么时候 + 总 reinforces the universal claim — HSK 4 commute topic

wrong_examples.wrong: 不管你努力学习，就能通过考试。
wrong_examples.right: 只要你努力学习，就能通过考试。
wrong_examples.explain: 不管 needs a VARIABLE (怎么/什么/多). A fixed condition uses 只要…就.

wrong_examples.right: 不管下不下雨，我都去。/ 因为下雨，我不去了。
wrong_examples.explain: 不管 must cover multiple possibilities (下不下雨) and pair with 都/也.

quiz.stem: ___遇到什么困难，我们___不能放弃。
quiz.explain: Any difficulty (variable) → 不管. 只要 is for a specific condition.

quiz.stem: ___结果怎么样，我___不后悔自己的选择。
quiz.explain: Covering all possible results → 不管…都.

quiz.stem: ___多远，他每天___骑自行车上班。
quiz.explain: 多远 = however far (variable degree) → 不管.

exercises.sentence: 不管多远，他___骑自行车去。
___是周末还是工作日，他都在学习。

summary: Assumes a hypothetical extreme situation, then states the result won't change. The condition may NOT be true — it's a worst-case scenario.
structure: 即使 + hypothetical condition, 也 + unchanged result
compare_note: 即使 = even IF (hypothetical). 尽管 = despite (factual). This is one of the most tested distinctions at HSK 4.

examples.cn: 即使明天下雪，我也要去上班。
examples.py: Jíshǐ míngtiān xià xuě, wǒ yě yào qù shàng bān.
examples.en: Even if it snows tomorrow, I'll still go to work.
examples.note: Tomorrow's snow hasn't happened — hypothetical

examples.cn: 即使困难再大，我们也不会放弃。
examples.py: Jíshǐ kùnnán zài dà, wǒmen yě bú huì fàngqì.
examples.en: Even if the difficulties are greater, we won't give up.
examples.note: 再 emphasizes 'even more extreme'

examples.cn: 即使你不同意，我也要这样做。
examples.py: Jíshǐ nǐ bù tóngyì, wǒ yě yào zhèyàng zuò.
examples.en: Even if you disagree, I'll still do it this way.
examples.note: Your disagreement is hypothetical / anticipated

examples.cn: 即使遇到再大的困难，我们也要保持冷静。
examples.py: Jíshǐ yùdào zài dà de kùnnán, wǒmen yě yào bǎochí lěngjìng.
examples.en: Even if we run into bigger difficulties, we still have to stay calm.
examples.note: 再 + adj raises the hypothetical extreme. 保持冷静 is the HSK 4 collocation tested in 阅读 problem-solving passages

examples.cn: 即使老板答应给我更高的工资，我也不愿意继续做这份工作。
examples.py: Jíshǐ lǎobǎn dāyìng gěi wǒ gèng gāo de gōngzī, wǒ yě bú yuànyì jìxù zuò zhè fèn gōngzuò.
examples.en: Even if my boss promises me a higher salary, I'm still unwilling to keep this job.
examples.note: Hypothetical incentive + unchanged decision — workplace HSK 4 context

wrong_examples.wrong: 即使外面正在下大雨，他也出门了。
wrong_examples.right: 尽管外面正在下大雨，他还是出门了。
wrong_examples.explain: It IS raining right now (factual, 正在) → use 尽管, not 即使.

wrong_examples.wrong: 即使很累，但是我很开心。
wrong_examples.right: 即使很累，我也很开心。/ 虽然很累，但是我很开心。
wrong_examples.explain: 即使 pairs with 也, NOT 但是. Use 虽然…但是 instead.

quiz.stem: ___价格再贵，这个东西我___要买。
quiz.explain: Hypothetical (might be expensive) → 即使.

quiz.stem: ___失败了，我们___要再试一次。
quiz.explain: Hypothetical extreme (even if we fail) → 即使…也.

quiz.stem: ___他说得很有道理，我___不完全同意。
quiz.explain: Both work, but 即使 emphasizes the hypothetical concession more strongly.

summary: States a NECESSARY condition — B can ONLY happen if A is met. There is no other way to achieve B.
structure: 只有 + necessary condition, 才 + result
compare_note: 只有…才 = necessary (ONLY way). 只要…就 = sufficient (one of many ways). Opposite logic!

examples.cn: 只有多练习，才能提高口语水平。
examples.py: Zhǐyǒu duō liànxí, cái néng tígāo kǒuyǔ shuǐpíng.
examples.en: Only by practicing more can you improve your speaking.
examples.note: Practice is the ONLY way

examples.cn: 只有亲自去一趟，才能了解真实情况。
examples.py: Zhǐyǒu qīnzì qù yí tàng, cái néng liǎojiě zhēnshí qíngkuàng.
examples.en: Only by going yourself can you understand the real situation.
examples.note: No substitute for being there

examples.cn: 只有大家一起努力，才能完成这个项目。
examples.py: Zhǐyǒu dàjiā yìqǐ nǔlì, cái néng wánchéng zhège xiàngmù.
examples.en: Only if everyone works together can we finish this project.
examples.note: Collective effort is necessary

examples.cn: 只有认真复习，才能在考试中取得好成绩。
examples.py: Zhǐyǒu rènzhēn fùxí, cái néng zài kǎoshì zhōng qǔdé hǎo chéngjì.
examples.en: Only by reviewing seriously can you get good grades on the exam.
examples.note: 认真 + 复习 + 取得 + 成绩 — all HSK 4. Classic study-advice frame in HSK 4 阅读

examples.cn: 只有打好基础，将来才能学会更难的内容。
examples.py: Zhǐyǒu dǎ hǎo jīchǔ, jiānglái cái néng xuéhuì gèng nán de nèiróng.
examples.en: Only by laying a solid foundation can you later learn more difficult material.
examples.note: 将来 + 才能 = future result depends on present foundation; classic HSK 4 study advice

wrong_examples.right: 只有你努力，才能成功。/ 只要你努力，就能成功。
wrong_examples.explain: 只有 pairs with 才 (not 就). If using 就, change to 只要.

wrong_examples.wrong: 只有今天天气好，才去爬山。
wrong_examples.right: 只要今天天气好，就去爬山。
wrong_examples.explain: Good weather is sufficient (not the ONLY factor) → 只要…就.

quiz.stem: ___坚持锻炼，___能保持健康。
quiz.explain: Exercise is necessary for health (strict) → 只有…才.

quiz.stem: ___通过了HSK 4，___能申请这个奖学金。
quiz.explain: HSK 4 is a mandatory requirement → 只有…才.

quiz.stem: ___认真听讲，___能学好这门课。
quiz.explain: Listening carefully is necessary → 只有…才.

exercises.sentence: 只有亲自去看，___知道是什么样子。

summary: Presents a condition and warns about the negative consequence if it's NOT met. 否则/不然 mean 'otherwise'.
structure: 要是 + condition, (就)… ; 否则/不然 + bad consequence
compare_note: 要是…就 = if A, then B (neutral). 要是…否则 = if NOT A, then bad B (warning).

examples.cn: 要是明天不下雨，我们就去爬山。
examples.py: Yàoshi míngtiān bú xià yǔ, wǒmen jiù qù páshān.
examples.en: If it doesn't rain tomorrow, we'll go hiking.
examples.note: 要是…就 = simple if-then

examples.cn: 你要早点出发，否则会迟到的。
examples.py: Nǐ yào zǎo diǎn chūfā, fǒuzé huì chídào de.
examples.en: You should leave early, otherwise you'll be late.
examples.note: 否则 = otherwise (formal warning)

examples.cn: 快点写作业，不然来不及了。
examples.py: Kuài diǎn xiě zuòyè, bùrán lái bù jí le.
examples.en: Do your homework quickly, or you won't make it.
examples.note: 不然 = otherwise (casual)

examples.cn: 你最好按时吃药，否则病可能会更严重。
examples.py: Nǐ zuìhǎo ànshí chī yào, fǒuzé bìng kěnéng huì gèng yánzhòng.
examples.en: You'd better take your medicine on time, otherwise your illness may become more serious.
examples.note: 最好 + 否则 + 可能会 = polite warning of a bad outcome — HSK 4 health context

examples.cn: 我们得提前预订房间，不然到时候就没地方住了。
examples.py: Wǒmen děi tíqián yùdìng fángjiān, bùrán dào shíhou jiù méi dìfang zhù le.
examples.en: We have to book a room in advance, or there'll be no place to stay when we arrive.
examples.note: 不然 + 到时候 = casual contingency warning — HSK 4 travel-planning topic

wrong_examples.wrong: 要是你不来，否则我自己去。
wrong_examples.right: 要是你不来，我就自己去。/ 你最好来，否则我自己去了。
wrong_examples.explain: Don't combine 要是 directly with 否则 — 否则 already implies 'if not'. Either use 要是…就 or state the condition + 否则.

wrong_examples.wrong: 否则努力学习，你不能通过考试。
wrong_examples.right: 如果不努力学习，你就不能通过考试。
wrong_examples.explain: 否则 goes AFTER the main statement, not at the beginning.

quiz.stem: 你得多穿点衣服，___会感冒的。
quiz.explain: Warning consequence → 否则 (otherwise you'll catch cold).

quiz.stem: ___你有时间，就来我家吃饭吧。
quiz.explain: Simple if-then → 要是.

quiz.stem: 快走吧，___赶不上火车了。
quiz.explain: Casual 'otherwise' → 不然.

exercises.sentence: 你得早点出发，___会迟到的。

summary: Emphasizes that EVEN the most unlikely or extreme case is true, implying everything else is even more so.
structure: 连 + extreme case + 都/也 + verb
compare_note: 连…都 is stronger emphasis than just using 也 or 都 alone.

examples.cn: 他连自己的名字都不会写。
examples.py: Tā lián zìjǐ de míngzì dōu bú huì xiě.
examples.en: He can't even write his own name.
examples.note: Name = easiest thing, so everything else is implied impossible

examples.cn: 这道题连老师都不会做。
examples.py: Zhè dào tí lián lǎoshī dōu bú huì zuò.
examples.en: Even the teacher can't solve this problem.
examples.note: Teacher = most capable person, emphasizing extreme difficulty

examples.cn: 她忙得连吃饭的时间都没有。
examples.py: Tā máng de lián chīfàn de shíjiān dōu méiyǒu.
examples.en: She's so busy she doesn't even have time to eat.
examples.note: Eating = basic necessity, emphasizing extreme busyness

examples.cn: 这个城市发展太快了，连住了很多年的人都常常找不到回家的路。
examples.py: Zhège chéngshì fāzhǎn tài kuài le, lián zhù le hěn duō nián de rén dōu chángcháng zhǎo bú dào huí jiā de lù.
examples.en: This city is developing so fast that even people who've lived here for many years often can't find their way home.
examples.note: 住了很多年的人 = those most familiar — emphasizes the scale of change. Common HSK 4 reading topic

examples.cn: 他对那段历史很熟悉，连小细节也记得清清楚楚。
examples.py: Tā duì nà duàn lìshǐ hěn shúxī, lián xiǎo xìjié yě jìde qīngqīngchǔchǔ.
examples.en: He knows that period of history so well that even small details are crystal clear in his memory.
examples.note: 小细节 = least notable, showcasing mastery — HSK 4 描述人物 frame

wrong_examples.right: 连他都不会做。/ 他那么聪明都不会做。
wrong_examples.explain: 连 directly precedes the emphasized element (him), not a full clause. Put 连 right before the noun/pronoun.
Must have 都/也 after the emphasized element. 连…都/也 is a fixed frame.

quiz.stem: 这个字太难了，___老师___不认识。
quiz.explain: Emphasizing extreme case (even the teacher) → 连…都.

quiz.stem: 他累得___话___不想说了。
quiz.explain: So tired that even talking is too much → 连…都.

quiz.stem: 这件事___小孩子___知道。
quiz.explain: Even children know (easiest/most basic case) → 连…都.

exercises.hint: He can't even write his own name

exercises.sentence: 她忙得___吃饭的时间___没有。
exercises.hint: So busy she doesn't even have time to eat
Even the teacher can't solve it

summary: Negates one interpretation and asserts the correct one. Used to correct a misunderstanding or clarify the real situation.
structure: 不是 + wrong assumption, 而是 + correct reality
compare_note: 不是…而是 corrects. 不但…而且 adds. Very different logic.

examples.cn: 他不是不想去，而是没有时间。
examples.py: Tā búshì bù xiǎng qù, érshì méiyǒu shíjiān.
examples.en: It's not that he doesn't want to go, but that he has no time.
examples.note: Correcting a misunderstanding about his reluctance

examples.cn: 成功不是靠运气，而是靠努力。
examples.py: Chénggōng búshì kào yùnqi, érshì kào nǔlì.
examples.en: Success isn't about luck, but about effort.
examples.note: Correcting a common belief

examples.cn: 我不是生气，而是有点儿失望。
examples.py: Wǒ búshì shēngqì, érshì yǒudiǎnr shīwàng.
examples.en: I'm not angry, just a bit disappointed.
examples.note: Clarifying the real emotion

examples.cn: 这次比赛重要的不是输赢，而是参加的过程。
examples.py: Zhè cì bǐsài zhòngyào de búshì shū yíng, érshì cānjiā de guòchéng.
examples.en: What matters in this competition isn't winning or losing, but the experience of taking part.
examples.note: Reframes priorities — common HSK 4 essay/reading-passage thesis

examples.cn: 学好一门外语，难的不是发音，而是坚持。
examples.py: Xué hǎo yì mén wàiyǔ, nán de búshì fāyīn, érshì jiānchí.
examples.en: When learning a foreign language, the hard part isn't pronunciation — it's persistence.
examples.note: Corrects a common assumption — HSK 4 language-learning topic

wrong_examples.wrong: 不是他来了，而是她来了。
wrong_examples.explain: The structure corrects what comes after 不是. Rephrase so the corrected element follows 不是 directly.

wrong_examples.right: 他不是聪明，而是努力。/ 他不但聪明，而且努力。
wrong_examples.explain: 不是 pairs with 而是 (correction). 不但 pairs with 而且 (addition). Don't mix them.

quiz.stem: 问题___出在方法上，___出在态度上。
quiz.explain: Correcting where the problem lies → 不是…而是.

quiz.stem: 他___不会做，___不想做。
quiz.explain: Correcting assumption (not 'can't' but 'won't') → 不是…而是.

quiz.stem: 学好中文___靠天分，___靠坚持。
quiz.explain: Not talent, but persistence → 不是…而是.

exercises.sentence: 成功不是靠运气，___靠努力。

exercises.hint: It's not that he's not smart...

pattern_en: On one hand... on the other hand...
summary: Presents two aspects, reasons, or sides of a situation. Both clauses are equally weighted.
structure: 一方面 + aspect A, 另一方面 + aspect B
compare_note: 一方面…另一方面 = two equal sides. 不但…而且 = progressive (second is more important).

examples.cn: 一方面他想去留学，另一方面他又舍不得离开家人。
examples.py: Yì fāngmiàn tā xiǎng qù liúxué, lìng yì fāngmiàn tā yòu shěbude líkāi jiārén.
examples.en: On one hand he wants to study abroad; on the other, he can't bear to leave his family.
examples.note: Two conflicting feelings of equal weight

examples.cn: 这份工作一方面工资高，另一方面压力也大。
examples.py: Zhè fèn gōngzuò yì fāngmiàn gōngzī gāo, lìng yì fāngmiàn yālì yě dà.
examples.en: This job has a high salary on one hand, but also high pressure on the other.
examples.note: Balancing pros and cons

examples.cn: 一方面要保护环境，另一方面也要发展经济。
examples.py: Yì fāngmiàn yào bǎohù huánjìng, lìng yì fāngmiàn yě yào fāzhǎn jīngjì.
examples.en: On one hand we must protect the environment; on the other, develop the economy.
examples.note: Two equally important goals

examples.cn: 锻炼身体一方面能让人更健康，另一方面也能减轻压力。
examples.py: Duànliàn shēntǐ yì fāngmiàn néng ràng rén gèng jiànkāng, lìng yì fāngmiàn yě néng jiǎnqīng yālì.
examples.en: Exercising can on one hand make you healthier, and on the other relieve stress.
examples.note: Two parallel benefits — frequent HSK 4 reading-passage structure

examples.cn: 上网一方面给我们的生活带来了方便，另一方面也带来了一些新的问题。
examples.py: Shàng wǎng yì fāngmiàn gěi wǒmen de shēnghuó dàilái le fāngbiàn, lìng yì fāngmiàn yě dàilái le yìxiē xīn de wèntí.
examples.en: Going online has on one hand made our lives more convenient, and on the other brought some new problems.
examples.note: Frames a balanced 利弊 (pros/cons) discussion — very HSK 4 essay-style

wrong_examples.wrong: 一方面他很聪明，另一方面他考了第一名。
wrong_examples.right: 他不但很聪明，而且考了第一名。
wrong_examples.explain: Getting 1st place is a RESULT of being smart, not a parallel aspect. Use 不但…而且 for progressive results.

wrong_examples.wrong: 一方面下雨了，另一方面我没带伞。
wrong_examples.right: 因为下雨了，而且我没带伞，所以…
wrong_examples.explain: These are not two balanced aspects but a cause-effect chain.

quiz.stem: ___工作很有意思，___工资也不低。
quiz.explain: Two equal aspects of a job → 一方面…另一方面. (不但…而且 also works but implies the second is more important.)

quiz.stem: ___要节约用水，___也不能影响正常生活。
quiz.explain: Two balanced considerations → 一方面…另一方面.

quiz.stem: 学中文___能了解中国文化，___对找工作也有帮助。
quiz.explain: Two parallel benefits → 一方面…另一方面.

exercises.hint: On one hand study abroad, on the other miss family

exercises.sentence: 一方面要保护环境，___也要发展经济。
这份工作___工资高，另一方面压力也大。
